mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "REVIEWS" VALUES( SEQ_REVIEWS_NO.NEXTVAL, #{memberNo}, #{stageNo}, #{reviewContent}, SYSDATE, NULL, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT REVIEW_NO, MEMBER_NO, REVIEW_CONTENT, REVIEW_WRITE_DATE, MEMBER_EMAIL FROM REVIEWS JOIN MEMBER USING (MEMBER_NO) WHERE STAGE_NO = #{stageNo} AND REVIEW_DEL_FL = 'N' ORDER BY REVIEW_WRITE_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REVIEWS WHERE STAGE_NO = #{stageNo} AND REVIEW_DEL_FL = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE REVIEWS SET REVIEW_CONTENT = #{reviewContent}, REVIEW_UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE REVIEW_NO = #{reviewNo}
UPDATE REVIEWS SET REVIEW_DEL_FL = 'Y', REVIEW_UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE REVIEW_NO = #{reviewNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPORT(REPORT_NO, REPORT_REASON, REPORT_DETAIL, REPORT_DATE, REPORT_STATUS, REPORTER_NO, REPORTED_NO, REVIEW_NO) VALUES(SEQ_REPORT_NO.NEXTVAL, #{reportReason}, #{reportDetail}, SYSDATE, 'PENDING', #{reporterNo}, #{reportedNo}, #{reviewNo})
